name: D.D. Esper Star Sparrow
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>異</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>い</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>次</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>元</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>げん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>エスパー・スター・ロビン
desc: There can only be 1 "D.D. Esper Star Sparrow" on the field. Your opponent cannot target other monsters you control with effects or for attacks. When an opponent's monster declares a direct attack while this card is in your Graveyard: You can Special Summon this card from your Graveyard in face-up Defense Position. If Summoned this way, banish it when it leaves the field.
mnst_eff: There can only be 1 "D.D. Esper Star Sparrow" on the field. Your opponent cannot target other monsters you control with effects or for attacks. When an opponent's monster declares a direct attack while this card is in your Graveyard: You can Special Summon this card from your Graveyard in face-up Defense Position. If Summoned this way, banish it when it leaves the field.
eff: There can only be 1 "D.D. Esper Star Sparrow" on the field. Your opponent cannot target other monsters you control with effects or for attacks. When an opponent's monster declares a direct attack while this card is in your Graveyard: You can Special Summon this card from your Graveyard in face-up Defense Position. If Summoned this way, banish it when it leaves the field.

jp_sets.set: Duel Terminal - Ouroboros, Wicked Dragon of Destruction!!

mst: Prevents other cards being targeted by card effects
summoning: Special Summons itself from your Graveyard
attack: Prevents other cards being targeted for attacks
banished: Banishes itself when it leaves the field
